body.p: SequoiaDB Enterprise Edition Ad-hoc Query Engine allows users to use standard JDBC/ODBC driver to query data located in SequoiaDB database.
Ad-hoc Query Engine is designed to better handle queries under milliseconds for ad-hoc query workload. SEE analytics engine will be a better choice for complex long queries.
SEE Ad-hoc Query Engine is coming with SequoiaDB Enterprise Edition installation package.
